plan.failureSummary: The AI agent failed to find the 'Submit' button because the page layout and field labels have changed, making the cached deterministic instructions stale.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode used with stale cache (usedDeterministicMode: true)
UI redesign detected: 'Last Name' label changed to 'Your Name' in failure screenshot
Required field validation errors visible for fields the AI attempted to fill with outdated selectors
Step 8 'click' on Submit failed because the button was likely not rendered or identified correctly due to prior validation failures
Flexible semantic intent ('Fill out all survey questions') suggests recovery is likely with a fresh AI run

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Delete the local AI cache for this test and re-run. This will force the agent to re-map the form fields and adapt to the new 'Occupation' and 'Interests' fields.

remediationSteps.summary: Review and refine AI prompt for new form structure
remediationSteps.details: If the AI still struggles after a cache clear, update the prompt to explicitly mention the new fields if they require specific data formats.

plan.notes: Visual comparison between the tool call parameters and the failure screenshot confirms a UI redesign: 'Last Name' changed to 'Your Name', 'Email Address' to 'Contact Email', and new required fields like 'Occupation' appeared. The deterministic cache is pointing to non-existent or incorrect elements.
